ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1-4) */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year of the weather data */,
  "mnth" INTEGER /* Month of the year (1-12) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1-4) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Apparent temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers or miles */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_rental_data" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike rental data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data for the same day */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Instant of the bike rental data */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual bike rentals */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered bike rentals */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_type" TEXT /* Type of rental (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rental_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the station */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals_by_station" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rental data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the bike rental data */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual bike rentals */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered bike rentals */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_type" TEXT /* Type of rental (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id", "station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_by_station_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, marketing team, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rental data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rental_data ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rental data */,
  "predicted_cnt" INTEGER /* Predicted number of bike rentals */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "actual_cnt" INTEGER /* Actual number of bike rentals (for comparison) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rental_data ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the month */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the month */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_week" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the day */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the day */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)
